Syntax Definition crab 3414
Description: Extend class notation to include the restricted class abstraction (class builder).
Hypotheses
Ref Expression
wph wff 𝜑
vx setvar 𝑥
cA class 𝐴
Assertion
Ref Expression
crab class {𝑥 ∈ 𝐴 ∣ 𝜑}
See definition df-rab 3415 for more information.
Colors of variables: wff setvar class
